detail.description:
Don't go into the Hole.
I know, I know that inside the Hole there are Ether resources, mutated creatures, and even the legacy of the old civilization, all of which are precious treasures.
But don't forget that the space inside is chaotic, monsters are rampant, mutations are everywhere, after all, this is a disaster that has engulfed the world, not a place where ordinary people should go.
So don't go into the Hole.
At least don't go into the Hole "alone".
If you insist on going into a dangerous p
